PLAINTIFF HARTFORD CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTON FOR ORDER SETTING ASIDE DISMISSAL AND ENTERING JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL ONLY IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. DISMISSAL IS ORDERED VACATED. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION TO BE SUMBITTED TO THE LAW AND MOTION DEPARTMENT, DEPARTMENT 302. COURT ORDERED CASE SCHEDULED FOR AN OSC RE: DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 ON 10/14/2008 AT 10:00 AM, IN DEPARTMENT 212. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: KAREN FARNSWORTH, CSR#5162. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-03-2008 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Setting Aside Dismissal And Entering Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation
Off Calendar Jul-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Hartford Casualty Insurance Company's Moton for Order Setting Aside Dismissal and Entering Judgment Pursuant to Stipulation is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion to set aside dismissal only is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Dismissal is ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Motion for Entry of Judgment pursuant to stipulation to be sumbitted to the Law and Motion Department, Department 302. Court ordered case scheduled for an OSC re: Dismissal pursuant to CRC 3.1385 on 10/14/2008 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Karen Farnsworth, CSR#5162. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez, CSR# 7782. (212)
